heading: Omitted
label: 1311 to 1313 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1311, , , which related to equality in internal taxes for United States products coming into the Philippines, was omitted on authority of which provided that this subchapter be effective until the expiration of the revised agreement between the United States and the Republic of the Philippines which occurred on .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title III, § 32160 Stat. 150section 1291(b)(1) of this titleJuly 4, 1974Section 1312, , , prohibited export taxes by the Philippines on articles exported to the United States. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title III, § 32260 Stat. 150section 1311 of this titleSection 1313, , , provided an exemption from taxes for articles for official use of the United States Government. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title III, § 32360 Stat. 150section 1311 of this title
